song.title: Great is the Lord
song.author: Psalm 48:1-2
song.lyrics: [V1] .G D Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised, . D7 In the city of our God, . G In the mountain of His holiness.|| . G7 C Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth, . G Is Mount Zion, on the sides of the north, . D G The city of the great King, .C G Is Mount Zion, on the sides of the north, . D G The city of the great King.
